summary: Cyber & Data Breach insurance covering first-party costs (incident response, ransomware, data recovery) and third-party liability (regulatory fines, privacy claims) from cyber incidents. Fastest-growing UK specialty line with high accumulation exposure.

schemaEntities.description: Cyber risk profile entity. Custom: IndustryCode, RevenueUSD, RecordCount_PII, RecordCount_PHI, CloudDependencyScore, MFAImplemented, EDR_Deployed, BackupFrequency, PatchCycleDays, IncidentResponsePlan, CyberSecurityCertification, ThirdPartyVendorCount, CriticalSystems, DataEncryptionStandard, ICO_Registered.

103 rules: MFA mandatory for limits >£1M, critical infrastructure sector loading, GDPR/UK GDPR data volume scoring, cloud concentration accumulation checks, ransomware susceptibility scoring, ICO registration validation.
Accumulation monitoring entity. Custom: CloudProviderExposure, SoftwareVendorExposure, CumulativeRiskBand, CorrelationScore, PMLEstimate, AccumulationZone, ReinsuranceTriggerFlag, CatModRef.

relationships.note: 15 cyber risk profile fields drive pricing, deductibles, and sublimits
Accumulation entity tracks cloud/software concentration -- no GW Cloud equivalent
103 rules include mandatory MFA hard stop and ransomware scoring logic

migrationIssues.detail: CyberRisk_Cyber has 15 custom fields representing the cyber risk questionnaire. No GW Cloud standard cyber entity -- complete new entity design required.
CyberAccumulation_Cyber tracks cloud provider and software vendor concentration. No GW Cloud accumulation engine -- external catastrophe model (RMS, Cyence) integration required.
Ransomware susceptibility and cyber security posture scoring integrated with external threat intelligence APIs (BitSight, SecurityScorecard). GW Cloud has no native integration.
Data volume-based ICO notification obligation triggers. ICO registration lookup and GDPR fine estimator logic require external regulatory data integration.
Ransomware coverage with negotiation cost and cryptocurrency payment sublimits. GW Cloud coverage terms support sublimits -- negotiation cost rules need migration.

cloudMapping.action: Field supported -- mandatory MFA >£1M rule migration required
ICO register validation API integration required
RMS Cyber/Cyence integration for accumulation monitoring -- major integration effort
Cyber threat intelligence API integration -- new external connector required
